example: The police dropped the charge against him last week.

example: Her performance at work impressed the entire team.

example: This dress has a beautiful flower pattern on it.

example: We finally reached the top of the mountain at noon.

example: I really like the design of this new phone.

example: Her main goal is to study medicine abroad.

example: A single drop of rain fell on my hand.

example: The doctor took some blood for the test.

example: Trust forms the basis of a good friendship.

example: She found her job through an employment agency.

example: We need further information before making a decision.
exampleCn: 在做决定之前我们需要更多的信息。

example: Blue is my favorite color for summer clothes.
exampleCn: 蓝色是我夏装最喜欢的颜色。

example: Let me introduce my best friend to you.

example: She wrote a popular series of children's books.
exampleCn: 她写了一套很受欢迎的儿童丛书。

example: I recently moved to a new apartment downtown.

example: We should protect the environment for future generations.

example: Hard work is the key to real success.

example: The report gives a careful analysis of the data.

example: It is natural to feel nervous before a test.

example: Please ensure all windows are closed before leaving.

example: This region is famous for its tea and rice.

example: I made a list of things to buy.

example: Honesty is a basic principle in our family.

example: These two events relate closely to each other.
exampleCn: 这两件事彼此密切相关。

example: Bad weather can affect our travel plans.

example: Air pollution is a serious problem in big cities.

example: Driving without a license is not legal here.

example: Heart disease is common among older people.

example: The main function of the heart is pumping blood.

example: Jeans are not appropriate for a formal wedding.

example: The small shop made a good profit this year.

example: I caught a bad cold after the rainy hike.

example: Let's assume the meeting will start on time.

example: Use a ruler to measure the width of the paper.

example: Our class learned division and multiplication this term.

example: We need to replace the broken window soon.

example: The agent earns a commission on every house sold.

exampleCn: 在任何情况下你都不应该打开那扇门。

example: Reading is a basic skill every child must learn.

example: Most people are aware of the dangers of smoking.

example: You should ask a professional to fix the wiring.

exampleCn: 他为这次旅行买了一台新相机。

example: The coach taught us a new swimming technique.

example: Check each item on the list before packing.
exampleCn: 打包前核对清单上的每一项。

example: Television remains a powerful medium for news.
exampleCn: 电视仍然是传播新闻的有力媒介。

example: My uncle loves talking about politics at dinner.
exampleCn: 我叔叔吃饭时喜欢谈论政治。

example: The doctors will perform the operation tomorrow morning.
exampleCn: 医生们将于明天上午进行手术。

example: Please download the latest version of the app.
exampleCn: 请下载该应用的最新版本。

example: It is okay to ask for help sometimes.
exampleCn: 有时候寻求帮助是可以的。

example: Each candidate gave a short speech to the voters.
exampleCn: 每位候选人都向选民发表了简短的演讲。

example: She gave me a direct answer to my question.
exampleCn: 她直截了当地回答了我的问题。

example: Press the red button to start the machine.
exampleCn: 按红色按钮启动机器。

example: My father gave me useful advice about saving money.
exampleCn: 父亲给了我关于存钱的有用建议。

example: It was warm inside the house during the storm.
exampleCn: 暴风雨期间屋子里很暖和。

example: Every adult should learn basic first aid skills.
exampleCn: 每个成年人都应该学习基本的急救技能。

example: Speaking two languages gives you a big advantage.
exampleCn: 会说两种语言给你带来很大的优势。

example: Workers learn how to operate the new machines.
exampleCn: 工人们学习如何操作新机器。

example: Please call me immediately when you arrive home.
exampleCn: 你到家后请立即给我打电话。

example: Don't put the glass near the edge of the table.
exampleCn: 别把玻璃杯放在桌子边缘附近。

example: The market offers a wide variety of fresh fruit.
exampleCn: 市场上有各种各样的新鲜水果。

example: The young writer published her first story online.
exampleCn: 这位年轻作家在网上发表了她的第一篇小说。

example: We spent our holiday on a small quiet island.
exampleCn: 我们在一个安静的小岛上度假。

example: Learning a new language is a big challenge.
exampleCn: 学习一门新语言是一项巨大的挑战。

example: Many children have a fear of the dark.
exampleCn: 许多孩子害怕黑暗。

example: This little tool is very useful in the kitchen.
exampleCn: 这个小工具在厨房里非常有用。

example: He carried the heavy bag on his shoulder.
exampleCn: 他把沉重的包扛在肩上。

example: Plants depend on sunlight and water to grow.
exampleCn: 植物依靠阳光和水生长。

example: The majority of students passed the exam easily.
exampleCn: 大多数学生轻松通过了考试。

example: Her dream is to travel around the world.
exampleCn: 她的梦想是环游世界。

example: I agree with your opinion to some extent.
exampleCn: 在某种程度上我同意你的观点。

example: We met at a quiet bar near the station.
exampleCn: 我们在车站附近一家安静的酒吧见面。

example: The new app will enable users to share photos.
exampleCn: 这款新应用将使用户能够分享照片。

example: She won first prize in the singing competition.
exampleCn: 她在歌唱比赛中获得了一等奖。

example: The parliament passed the new law after long debate.
exampleCn: 经过长时间辩论，议会通过了新法律。

example: The store sells imported goods from many countries.
exampleCn: 这家商店出售来自许多国家的进口商品。

example: Put your stuff in the locker before swimming.
exampleCn: 游泳前把你的东西放进储物柜。

example: The speaker shared her experience of working abroad.
exampleCn: 演讲者分享了她在国外工作的经历。

example: You must complete the form before the deadline.
exampleCn: 你必须在截止日期前填完表格。

example: Students have free access to the school library.
exampleCn: 学生可以免费使用学校图书馆。

example: She reads a fashion magazine every month.
exampleCn: 她每个月都看一本时尚杂志。

example: He easily answered all the questions in the test.
exampleCn: 他轻松地回答了考试中的所有问题。

example: The school teaches students about sexual health.
exampleCn: 学校向学生传授性健康知识。

example: Regular exercise is an effective way to reduce stress.
exampleCn: 经常锻炼是减轻压力的有效方法。

example: The heat of the summer sun was hard to bear.
exampleCn: 夏日骄阳的炎热让人难以忍受。

example: You can make a payment online with your card.
exampleCn: 你可以用银行卡在线付款。

example: Their marriage has lasted for over thirty years.
exampleCn: 他们的婚姻已经持续了三十多年。

example: The team faced a tough match against the champions.
exampleCn: 这支球队面对冠军队打了一场硬仗。
